body:
Title: CRA Form T657 2025 Calculation of Capital Gains Deduction.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/t657/t657-25e.pdf

CRA T657 2025 calculates the capital gains deduction on line 25400. Normalized numeric values used by the encoded formulas include 0.50, 625000, 522145, and 2000. The form states that for 2025 the lifetime capital gains exemption is $1,250,000, so the capital gains deduction cannot exceed $625,000. If a T5013 slip or T3 slip indicates that a disposition occurred during Period 1 of 2024 and does not indicate that the amount relates to a capital gain reserve, the deduction limit is $522,145.

Step 1 calculates the annual gains limit for 2025. Line 1 is the total of Schedule 3 lines 10700, 11000, and 12400. Line 2 is Form T2017 line 13. Line 3 adds line 1 and line 2. Line 4 is the 1/2 inclusion rate, encoded as 0.50. Line 5 multiplies line 3 by line 4 and floors at zero. Line 6 is Form T2048 line 17216. Line 7 subtracts line 6 from line 5. Line 8 is Schedule 3 line 19900. Line 9 is Schedule 3 line 17600 multiplied by 1/2, encoded as 0.50. Line 10 subtracts line 9 from line 8. Line 11 is Form T2048 line 17215. Line 12 subtracts line 11 from line 10. Line 13 is the lesser of line 7 or line 12. Line 16 subtracts line 15 from line 14 and floors at zero. Line 19 subtracts line 18 from line 17 and floors at zero. Line 20 adds line 16 and line 19. Line 21 subtracts line 20 from line 13 and floors at zero.

Step 2 calculates the cumulative gains limit for 2025. Line 9 adds cumulative eligible taxable capital gains lines 1 to 8, including the 2025 eligible taxable capital gains from Step 1 line 13. Line 10 caps allowable capital losses claimed in 1985 at $2,000. Line 13 subtracts line 12 from line 11 and floors at zero. Line 18 adds lines 10 and 13 to 17. Line 19 subtracts line 18 from line 9 and floors at zero. Chart 2025 Part 1 applies to QFFP or QSBCS reported in 2025 but disposed of in Period 1 of 2024. Amount A is $522,145, amount E subtracts amount B and amount D from amount A and floors at zero, amount K adds amounts F to J, floors at zero, and multiplies by 1/2, amount P adds amount N and amount O, and amount Q is the lesser of Step 1 line 21, Step 2 line 19, or amount P. Chart 2025 Part 2 applies to QFFP or QSBCS disposed of in 2025 or disposed of after June 24, 2024 and reported in 2025. Amount A is $625,000, amount E subtracts amount B and amount D from amount A and floors at zero, amount K adds amounts F to J, floors at zero, and multiplies by 1/2, amount P adds amount N and amount O, and amount Q is the lesser of Step 1 line 21, Step 2 line 19, or amount P. The form states that amount Q is the maximum amount claimable on line 25400, but the taxpayer can choose to claim less.
